---
title: "llm.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/llm.ts"
loc: 78
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.72
style_score: 3.60
intel_score: 3.03
overall_score: 2.86
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 34 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FileData](file://../analyzer.ts)
- [CortexLink](file://../../../node/cortex_link.ts)

### Exports
- `code`
- `code`
- `MockProvider`
- `filename`
- `intent`
- `interaction`
- `CortexLink`
- `GeminiProvider`
- `batchQuery`
- `query`
- `res`
- `raw`
- `parsed`
- `mock`
- `defaultProvider`
- `defaultProvider`
